creator: david@catwhisker.org
text:
After sending the previous note, I see that the PR was created
subsequent to the commit I cited.

So I'm apparently confused.

Despite that particular confusion, I am successfully using
deskutils/ical on systems that have tcl/Tk 8.5, but which do not have
tcl/Tk 8.4.

So in any case, deskutils/ical clearly works with tcl/Tk 8.5, and this
PR should still be closed.

Peace,
david
-- 
David H. Wolfskill				david@catwhisker.org
Taliban: Evil men with guns afraid of truth from a 14-year old girl.

See http://www.catwhisker.org/~david/publickey.gpg for my public key.
